---
title: Energy-Efficient Mobile Web Computing
author:
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Pre-2018 Work
topics:
- watt_wise_web
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/dissertation.pdf
talk_source: https://speakerdeck.com/queeten/defense-talk-energy-efficient-mobile-web-computing
journ: Dissertation
year: 2017
contrib: Pre-2018 Work
image: featured.png
award: Honorable Mention of the ACM SIGARCH/IEEE-CS TCCA Outstanding Dissertation
  Award
pub_number: 15
---
